transcript:
Speaker A (AI): Hello, what is your name?
Speaker B (Rahul): My name is Rahul.
Speaker A (AI): How old are you?
Speaker B (Rahul): I have 22.
Speaker A (AI): I have 22 nahi, I am 22 yrs old hota hai. [Not "I have 22", it is "I am 22 yrs old".]
Speaker B (Rahul): Okay okay, I am 22 years old.
Speaker A (AI): Where are you from?
Speaker B (Rahul): I am Uttar Pradesh.
Speaker A (AI): I am Uttar Pradesh nahi, I am from Uttar Pradesh hoga. [Not "I am Uttar Pradesh", it will be "I am from Uttar Pradesh".]
Speaker B (Rahul): Oh theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh okay, okay. I don't know English very well.]
Speaker A (AI): Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?]
Speaker B (Rahul): Wo toh mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?]
Speaker A (AI): Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Speaker B (Rahul): Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.]
Speaker A (AI): Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]
Speaker B (Rahul): Wow, kaise join karu? [Wow, how do I join?]
Speaker A (AI): Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
Speaker C (Voiceover): Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Hello, what is your name? MY NAME IS RAHUL How old are you? I have 22 I have 22 nahi I am 22 yrs old OKAY OKAY I AM 22 YEARS OLD Where are you from? I am Uttar Pradesh I am Uttar Pradesh nahi I am from Uttar Pradesh THEEK MUJHE ENGLISH KOI PROBLEM AI TEACHERS WO 7X CHEAPER MySivi AI English Speakin... Sivi is now MySivi English Speaking App - Improve Your Spoken English and Fluency with AI Support MILTA ROZ KI SIRF 15-20 MINUTE KI PRACTICE BILKUL WANT KAISA JOIN AUR MYSIVI APP SIRF MEIN TUMHE IMPROVEMENT DIKHNE LEGEGI SHURU MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI robot avatar conducts a mock video call with a young Indian man, correcting his common grammatical mistakes in English. The robot then pitches the MySivi app as an affordable and convenient way to practice English. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
